name: tsrlib
description: Unified TSRLIB SDK with automated binary distribution and sidecar management

scripts.build:ffi: napi build --platform --esm -p rsdk-ffi --release --output-name rsdk --js packages/tsdk/src/rsdk.js --dts packages/tsdk/src/rsdk.d.ts && shx mv packages/rsdk/crates/ffi-adapter/rsdk.*.node packages/tsdk/src/rsdk.node
scripts.build:ffi:debug: napi build --platform --esm -p rsdk-ffi --output-name rsdk --js packages/tsdk/src/rsdk.js --dts packages/tsdk/src/rsdk.d.ts && shx mv packages/rsdk/crates/ffi-adapter/rsdk.*.node packages/tsdk/src/rsdk.node
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('bun --version', { stdio: 'ignore' }); execSync('bun run scripts/sync-binaries.ts', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { execSync('tsx scripts/sync-binaries.ts', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
